title: Bible
description: A scripture theme focused on books, people, stories, teachings, and major moments from the Bible. It is designed around broad, accessible knowledge of the text.

title: Harry Potter
description: A fantasy series about Harry Potter’s journey through Hogwarts and the wizarding world. Magic, friendship, dark forces, and unforgettable characters define the story.

title: Quran
description: A religion and scripture theme focused on the Quran, its content, figures, themes, and core knowledge. It is framed around respectful, broad familiarity with the text.

title: Canada
description: A country trivia theme covering Canadian provinces, cities, history, culture, sports, and famous people. It balances geography and pop culture knowledge.

title: Germany
description: A country trivia theme covering German history, culture, geography, landmarks, sports, and national identity. It is broad and designed for general audience quiz play.

title: U.S.A
description: A country trivia theme focused on American history, geography, culture, politics, and national symbols. It covers broad, recognizable facts about the United States.

title: United Kingdom
description: A country trivia theme covering the UK’s nations, cities, history, monarchy, culture, and notable institutions. It is broad, familiar, and easy to build into pub-style quiz rounds.

title: Finance & Investing
description: A finance theme covering money basics, markets, investing terms, companies, and economic concepts. It is designed around practical and widely recognized financial knowledge.

title: Health & Medicine
description: A health theme covering the human body, medicine, diseases, treatments, and general medical knowledge. It focuses on well-known concepts rather than specialist detail.

title: Language
description: A language theme covering words, grammar, meanings, usage, and language-related facts. It focuses on how language works rather than on one single language only.

title: Marketing & Brands
description: A branding and marketing theme covering famous campaigns, slogans, companies, products, and advertising concepts. It sits right at the intersection of business and pop culture.

title: Mathematics
description: A mathematics theme built around numbers, operations, formulas, logic, and classic math knowledge. It ranges from straightforward basics to more challenging concepts.

title: Spelling
description: A word-focused theme that tests spelling, tricky letter patterns, and common mistakes. It is straightforward but easy to get wrong under pressure.

title: Technology
description: A broad technology theme covering computers, software, internet culture, devices, and major tech concepts. It mixes practical knowledge with mainstream digital topics.

title: Word Definitions
description: A vocabulary theme focused on meanings, usage, and recognition of words. It is more knowledge-based than spelling and suits quick educational rounds.

title: Baldurs Gate 3
description: A deep role-playing game based on Dungeons & Dragons, packed with choices, companions, and branching consequences. It is driven by strategy, story freedom, and character builds.

title: Bloodborne
description: A gothic action RPG known for aggressive combat, cosmic horror, and the nightmare city of Yharnam. It remains one of the most distinctive modern Soulslike games.

title: Clair Obscur Expedition 33
description: A fantasy RPG with a striking art style and a story built around fate, loss, and a desperate expedition. It stands out as a fresh modern title with strong visual identity.

title: Demon Souls
description: A punishing action RPG built around difficult combat, atmospheric worlds, and foundational Souls mechanics. It is remembered for its bosses, archstones, and haunting tone.

title: Elden Ring
description: An open-world action RPG known for brutal combat, mysterious lore, and vast exploration across the Lands Between. It challenges players with difficult bosses and rich world-building.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: An action-adventure game about Jin Sakai’s fight to defend Tsushima during the Mongol invasion. It mixes samurai combat, stealth, and a striking open world.

title: GTA V
description: An open-world crime game set in Los Santos, following three protagonists through heists, chaos, and satire. It is known for freedom, scale, and huge cultural impact.

title: Lies of P
description: A dark action RPG inspired by Pinocchio, blending Belle Époque style with tough combat and twisted lore. It stands out for its atmosphere, weapon system, and boss design.

title: Minecraft
description: A sandbox game built around mining, crafting, building, survival, and open-ended creativity. It is one of the most influential and recognizable games ever made.

title: Pokémon
description: A franchise about trainers, battles, regions, creatures, and the goal of becoming the very best. It spans games, anime, evolutions, and iconic Pokémon knowledge.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: A story-rich western action game about outlaws, loyalty, and survival during the end of the Wild West. It is known for its open world, emotional depth, and unforgettable characters.

title: Resident Evil 4
description: A survival horror action game following Leon Kennedy on a mission through a hostile rural nightmare. It blends tension, combat, and one of gaming’s most iconic campaigns.

title: The Last of Us
description: A post-apocalyptic story about survival, loss, and the bond between Joel and Ellie. It mixes emotional storytelling with infected threats and dangerous human factions.

title: The Witcher 3
description: A fantasy RPG following Geralt of Rivia through war, monsters, contracts, and the search for Ciri. It is known for rich quests, deep lore, and standout expansions.

title: Animals
description: A general nature theme covering animal species, habitats, behavior, and surprising facts from the natural world. It works well as broad, accessible quiz content.

title: Bollywood
description: A film theme centered on Hindi cinema, major stars, hit movies, music, and iconic moments from Bollywood. It reflects one of the world’s biggest entertainment industries.

title: Fun Facts
description: A light general theme packed with quirky, surprising, and entertaining facts from different topics. It is built more for quick enjoyment than serious specialization.

title: Geography
description: A geography theme covering countries, capitals, landmarks, borders, maps, and major physical features of the world. It is built around places and global awareness.

title: History
description: A history theme covering major events, figures, wars, civilizations, and turning points across time. It draws from world history rather than one narrow period.

title: Hollywood
description: A general film theme covering famous actors, directors, blockbuster movies, and major moments in mainstream cinema. It spans classics, modern hits, and pop culture staples.

title: Music
description: A broad music trivia theme covering hit songs, artists, albums, genres, and memorable chart moments. It pulls from mainstream pop culture and widely known music facts.

title: Nigerian Music
description: A music theme focused on Nigerian artists, hit songs, genres, and major cultural moments. It covers Afrobeats, classic names, and modern chart success.

title: Nollywood
description: A movie theme focused on Nigerian cinema, actors, directors, and standout films from Nollywood. It covers a huge entertainment industry with massive local cultural impact.

title: Odd One Out
description: A quick-fire logic and general knowledge theme where players pick the item that does not belong. It relies on patterns, categories, and smart elimination.

title: Science
description: A broad science theme covering biology, chemistry, physics, space, and famous discoveries. It is designed around accessible but interesting scientific knowledge.

title: True or False
description: A fast general knowledge format built around statements that must be judged as true or false. It is simple, flexible, and ideal for rapid quiz rounds.

title: World Capitals
description: A geography theme focused specifically on capitals around the world. It is direct, recognizable, and perfect for fast recall trivia.

title: World Facts
description: A general knowledge theme covering notable facts about places, history, culture, science, and the wider world. It is built for broad, fast-paced trivia variety.

title: Boxing
description: A combat sports theme covering fighters, titles, divisions, and legendary bouts in boxing history. It spans both all-time greats and modern stars.

title: EPL Football
description: A football theme focused on the English Premier League, including clubs, players, managers, trophies, and famous seasons. It covers one of the world’s biggest leagues.

title: MMA
description: A combat sports theme focused on UFC-style mixed martial arts, fighters, weight classes, titles, and memorable bouts. It spans striking, grappling, and major moments in the cage.

title: NBA
description: A basketball theme covering teams, superstars, championships, records, and iconic moments from the NBA. It spans different eras, dynasties, and unforgettable performances.

title: NFL
description: An American football theme focused on teams, quarterbacks, Super Bowls, records, and memorable moments from the NFL. It covers the biggest names and biggest stages in the league.

title: Nigerian Football
description: A football theme centered on Nigeria’s teams, players, tournaments, and major moments in the sport. It includes club football, national team history, and local icons.

title: World Football
description: A broad football theme covering international stars, clubs, tournaments, records, and legendary matches. It draws from the global game beyond any one country or league.

title: WWE
description: A sports entertainment giant known for legendary wrestlers, rivalries, championships, and WrestleMania moments. The theme covers eras, finishing moves, factions, and iconic storylines.

title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
description: A Westeros story focused on Ser Duncan the Tall and Egg, set before the events of Game of Thrones. It offers a smaller-scale, character-driven entry into George R.R. Martin’s world.

title: Arcane
description: An animated drama set in the League of Legends universe, focused on class conflict, ambition, and the tragedy between Vi and Jinx. It is visually stunning and emotionally heavy.

title: Attack on Titan
description: A dark anime set in a world under siege by Titans, where war, secrets, and shifting loyalties drive the story. It is known for brutal twists and escalating stakes.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
description: An animated fantasy adventure following Aang and his friends as they try to end the Hundred Year War. It blends elemental powers, humor, and emotional storytelling.

title: Breaking Bad
description: A crime drama about Walter White’s transformation from chemistry teacher to ruthless meth kingpin. It is packed with tension, moral collapse, and unforgettable power shifts.

title: Bridgerton
description: A romantic period drama set in Regency-era high society, full of courtship, scandal, and family politics. It mixes glossy style with modern energy and major relationship drama.

title: Brooklyn 99
description: A police sitcom following Jake Peralta and the squad at the 99th precinct. It mixes workplace comedy, running jokes, and a lovable ensemble cast.

title: Community
description: A meta-heavy sitcom set at Greendale Community College, where a dysfunctional study group gets into increasingly absurd situations. It is known for genre parody and fast dialogue.

title: DC Movies
description: A superhero movie theme covering major DC characters, villains, and cinematic storylines. It spans Batman, Superman, Wonder Woman, and the wider DC film universe.

title: Demon Slayer
description: An anime about Tanjiro’s fight against demons while trying to save his sister and avenge his family. It combines emotional stakes with striking sword combat.

title: Dexter
description: A crime thriller about Dexter Morgan, a blood-spatter analyst who secretly lives as a serial killer with a code. It mixes suspense, dual identity, and moral tension.

title: Dragon Ball Z
description: A legendary anime known for extreme battles, transformations, and iconic warriors defending Earth. It covers major sagas, villains, powers, and unforgettable fights.

title: Friends
description: A beloved sitcom about six friends in New York navigating work, love, and everyday chaos. It mixes iconic catchphrases, messy relationships, and endlessly rewatchable humor.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
description: An anime and manga story built around alchemy, sacrifice, militarism, and the Elric brothers’ search to restore what they lost. It blends action, philosophy, and strong world-building.

title: Game of Thrones
description: An epic fantasy series built on political betrayal, family conflict, dragons, and war for the Iron Throne. It spans Westeros, key houses, and major turning points.

title: House of the Dragon
description: A fantasy prequel set in the Targaryen era, built around succession conflict, dragon power, and family betrayal. It expands the world of Westeros through civil war and legacy.

title: How I Met Your Mother
description: A sitcom built around Ted Mosby’s long story of love, friendship, and the road to meeting the mother. It mixes running gags, emotional turns, and ensemble chemistry.

title: Invincible
description: An animated superhero series that starts like a coming-of-age story and quickly turns brutal and shocking. It mixes family drama, power, and extreme violence.

title: Its Always Sunny in Philadelphia
description: A dark sitcom about five selfish disasters running Paddy’s Pub and ruining everyone around them. It is chaotic, cynical, and built on total moral collapse.

title: Lord of The Rings
description: A fantasy epic about fellowship, war, and the struggle against Sauron in Middle-earth. It covers key characters, places, battles, and legendary quest moments.

title: Lost
description: A mystery drama about plane crash survivors facing strange forces and secrets on a remote island. It blends survival, character drama, time-bending twists, and mythology.

title: Mad Men
description: A drama set in the advertising world of the 1960s, built around Don Draper and the people around him. It explores ambition, identity, power, and social change.

title: Marvel Movies
description: A blockbuster superhero franchise built around interconnected stories, major team-ups, and world-ending stakes. It spans heroes, villains, and key moments across the Marvel cinematic universe.

title: Modern Family
description: A family sitcom that follows the Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan through everyday life, parenting chaos, and relationship comedy. It blends heart, mockumentary style, and sharp jokes.

title: Money Heist
description: A Spanish crime series about a team of robbers carrying out elaborate heists under the Professor’s plan. It blends tension, strategy, and emotional character drama.

title: Naruto
description: A long-running anime following Naruto Uzumaki as he trains to become Hokage and earn the village’s respect. It blends ninja battles, rivalries, and emotional character arcs.

title: New Girl
description: A sitcom about Jess moving in with three male roommates and the chaos that follows. It thrives on awkward humor, strange chemistry, and lovable weirdness.

title: One Piece
description: A sprawling anime adventure following Luffy and the Straw Hat crew in search of the One Piece. It is packed with world-building, powers, rivalries, and huge story arcs.

title: Parks and Recreation
description: A warm workplace sitcom centered on Leslie Knope and the Parks Department in Pawnee. It mixes civic chaos, optimism, and a deeply lovable ensemble.

title: Peaky Blinders
description: A stylish crime drama about the Shelby family’s rise in postwar Birmingham. Power plays, gang conflict, ambition, and Tommy Shelby’s leadership drive the story.

title: Prison Break
description: A thriller about prison escape plans, conspiracies, and brothers trying to survive impossible odds. It runs on tension, twists, and clever strategy.

title: Rick and Morty
description: An animated sci-fi comedy about interdimensional adventures, cosmic absurdity, and an unstable genius-grandson duo. It mixes dark humor, chaos, and surprisingly big ideas.

title: Seinfeld
description: A classic sitcom about Jerry, George, Elaine, and Kramer turning everyday trivialities into comedy. It is famous for iconic episodes, sharp dialogue, and zero sentimentality.

title: Severance
description: A psychological sci-fi thriller about employees whose work and personal memories are surgically separated. It is eerie, controlled, and built around one of TV’s most gripping concepts.

title: Sons of Anarchy
description: A crime drama following an outlaw motorcycle club caught between loyalty, violence, and power struggles. Family tension and club politics drive the story.

title: Squid Game
description: A survival thriller where desperate contestants enter deadly games for a life-changing cash prize. It mixes sharp social commentary with suspense and shocking violence.

title: Star Trek
description: A major sci-fi franchise centered on exploration, diplomacy, starships, and life across the galaxy. It spans many series, crews, and generations of fandom.

title: Star Wars
description: A massive sci-fi saga of Jedi, Sith, rebels, empires, and galactic conflict. It covers iconic characters, planets, battles, and lore from across the franchise.

title: Stranger Things
description: A sci-fi horror series set in Hawkins, where kids uncover secret experiments, monsters, and a terrifying parallel world. It blends nostalgia, mystery, friendship, and supernatural danger.

title: Succession
description: A drama about the Roy family fighting for power over a global media empire. It thrives on manipulation, status, ego, and vicious family warfare.

title: Supernatural
description: A fantasy horror series following the Winchester brothers as they hunt monsters, demons, angels, and apocalyptic threats. It built a huge fanbase over many seasons.

title: Superstore
description: A workplace sitcom set in a chaotic big-box retail store, following employees through absurd customers and corporate nonsense. It balances comedy with sharp observations about work.

title: Ted Lasso
description: A feel-good comedy-drama about an American coach leading an English football club with optimism and emotional intelligence. It mixes sports, humor, and heartfelt character work.

title: The Big Bang Theory
description: A sitcom centered on a group of brilliant but socially awkward friends, their relationships, and their geek culture obsessions. Science, pop culture, and awkward banter drive the comedy.

title: The Boys
description: A dark superhero series where corrupt supes, corporate power, and brutal violence collide. It flips the normal hero formula into something cynical, chaotic, and savage.

title: The Office
description: A workplace mockumentary set at Dunder Mifflin, where awkward management and everyday office nonsense become comedy gold. It thrives on deadpan humor, running gags, and chaotic co-workers.

title: The Sopranos
description: A landmark crime drama about mob boss Tony Soprano balancing family life, therapy, and organized crime. It is grounded, psychological, and hugely influential.

title: The Vampire Diaries
description: A supernatural teen drama about love triangles, vampires, witches, and family legacies in Mystic Falls. It blends romance, lore, and constant twists.

title: The Walking Dead
description: A zombie apocalypse series about survival, shifting communities, and moral collapse in a brutal world. It mixes undead horror with constant human conflict.

title: The Wire
description: A grounded crime drama exploring institutions, crime, politics, and power in Baltimore. It is layered, realistic, and widely seen as one of TV’s best dramas.

title: True Blood
description: A supernatural drama where vampires, humans, and other creatures collide in a world of danger and desire. It mixes horror, fantasy, romance, and Southern gothic style.

title: Twilight
description: A supernatural romance series centered on Bella, Edward, Jacob, and the conflicts between vampires and werewolves. It mixes romance, danger, and franchise-defining love triangles.

title: Chemistry
description: Chemistry trivia on elements, reactions, formulas, and famous discoveries.

title: Physics
description: Physics trivia on motion, energy, forces, space, and scientific laws.

title: Food & Drink
description: Trivia on dishes, ingredients, cooking, drinks, and food culture.

title: Australia
description: Trivia on Australian geography, culture, cities, sports, and famous people.

title: God of War
description: Trivia on Kratos, gods, weapons, bosses, and the God of War games.

title: Horizon Zero Dawn
description: Trivia on Aloy, machines, tribes, quests, and story beats from Horizon Zero Dawn.

title: Spartacus
description: Trivia on gladiators, houses, battles, and characters from Spartacus.

title: Gossip Girl
description: Trivia on characters, scandals, relationships, and iconic moments from Gossip Girl.

title: Gilmore Girls
description: Trivia on Stars Hollow, relationships, family drama, and memorable scenes from Gilmore Girls.

title: Greys Anatomy
description: Trivia on doctors, surgeries, relationships, and storylines from Greys Anatomy.

title: Sex and the City
description: Trivia on Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte, Miranda, relationships, and New York moments.

title: Desperate Housewives
description: Trivia on Wisteria Lane, secrets, family drama, and iconic characters from Desperate Housewives.

title: True Crime
description: Trivia on infamous cases, criminals, investigations, and true crime history.
